description: Create comprehensive visualization of C18orf21 vs RPP21 structural comparison with pLDDT profiles and summary table
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Download AlphaFold models for both proteins
def get_alphafold_pdb(accession):
    api_url = f"https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/api/prediction/{accession}"
    resp = requests.get(api_url, timeout=15)
    api_data = resp.json()
    pdb_url = api_data[0]['pdbUrl']
    pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url, timeout=15)
    return pdb_resp.text

def parse_ca_atoms(pdb_text):
    atoms = []
    for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
        if line.startswith("ATOM") and line[12:16].strip() == "CA":
            resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
            resname = line[17:20].strip()
            bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
            atoms.append({'resnum': resnum, 'resname': resname, 'pLDDT': bfactor})
    return atoms

c18_pdb = get_alphafold_pdb('Q32NC0')
rpp21_pdb = get_alphafold_pdb('Q9H633')

c18_atoms = parse_ca_atoms(c18_pdb)
rpp21_atoms = parse_ca_atoms(rpp21_pdb)

c18_resnums = [a['resnum'] for a in c18_atoms]
c18_plddt = [a['pLDDT'] for a in c18_atoms]
rpp21_resnums = [a['resnum'] for a in rpp21_atoms]
rpp21_plddt = [a['pLDDT'] for a in rpp21_atoms]

# Create a multi-panel figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 12), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.2, 1.2, 1.5]})

# Panel 1: C18orf21/RMP24 pLDDT profile
ax1 = axes[0]
colors1 = []
for p in c18_plddt:
    if p > 90: colors1.append('#0053D6')
    elif p > 70: colors1.append('#65CBF3')
    elif p > 50: colors1.append('#FFDB13')
    else: colors1.append('#FF7D45')
ax1.bar(c18_resnums, c18_plddt, color=colors1, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('C18orf21/RMP24 (Q32NC0) — AlphaFold Confidence', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 225)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 100)

# Annotate structured core and disordered region
ax1.axvspan(2, 32, alpha=0.08, color='green')
ax1.axvspan(40, 125, alpha=0.08, color='green')
ax1.axvspan(126, 185, alpha=0.08, color='red')
ax1.text(60, 5, 'Structured core\n(DUF4674 domain)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkgreen')
ax1.text(155, 5, 'Disordered\nlinker', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkred')

# Mark CxxC motifs
ax1.annotate('CPYC\n(res 43-46)', xy=(44, c18_plddt[43]), xytext=(44, 40),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='purple'), fontsize=8, color='purple', ha='center')
ax1.annotate('CKTC\n(res 104-107)', xy=(105, c18_plddt[104]), xytext=(105, 40),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='purple'), fontsize=8, color='purple', ha='center')

# Panel 2: RPP21 pLDDT profile  
ax2 = axes[1]
colors2 = []
for p in rpp21_plddt:
    if p > 90: colors2.append('#0053D6')
    elif p > 70: colors2.append('#65CBF3')
    elif p > 50: colors2.append('#FFDB13')
    else: colors2.append('#FF7D45')
ax2.bar(rpp21_resnums, rpp21_plddt, color=colors2, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
ax2.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)
ax2.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, linewidth=0.8)
ax2.set_ylabel('pLDDT', fontsize=11)
ax2.set_title('RPP21 (Q9H633) — AlphaFold Confidence (structural homolog)', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 160)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 100)

ax2.axvspan(3, 117, alpha=0.08, color='green')
ax2.text(60, 5, 'Structured core\n(Rpr2/Rpp21 domain)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkgreen')

# Mark CxxC motifs in RPP21
ax2.annotate('CRGC\n(res 62-65)', xy=(63, rpp21_plddt[62]), xytext=(63, 35),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='purple'), fontsize=8, color='purple', ha='center')
ax2.annotate('CLTC\n(res 92-95)', xy=(93, rpp21_plddt[92]), xytext=(93, 35),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='purple'), fontsize=8, color='purple', ha='center')

# Panel 3: Comparative summary
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.axis('off')

summary_text = """
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     STRUCTURAL COMPARISON SUMMARY                                          │
├─────────────────────┬──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────┤
│  Feature            │  C18orf21/RMP24          │  RPP21                   │
├─────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┤
│  UniProt            │  Q32NC0                  │  Q9H633                  │
│  Length             │  220 aa                  │  154 aa                  │
│  Pfam               │  PF15719 (Rmp24-like)    │  PF04032 (Rpr2/Rpp21)    │
│  Structured core    │  ~120 aa (res 2-125)     │  ~115 aa (res 3-117)     │
│  Core mean pLDDT    │  90.3                    │  95.1                    │
│  Core SS content    │  H=62, E=32              │  H=57, E=31             │
│  CxxC motifs        │  CPYC (43), CKTC (104)   │  CRGC (62), CLTC (92)    │
│  Basic residues     │  22.7%                   │  16.9%                   │
│  Complex            │  RNase MRP (specific)    │  RNase P (specific)      │
│  Foldseek E-value   │  ~10⁻⁴ (structural homology)                       │
│  Sequence identity  │  <15% (undetectable by BLAST)                       │
│  PDB structure      │  9UH9 chain K (3.47Å)    │  No standalone PDB       │
│  Function           │  rRNA processing         │  tRNA processing         │
└─────────────────────┴──────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────┘
"""

ax3.text(0.02, 0.98, summary_text, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=9,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/c18orf21_structural_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved!")
